visual_analysis: The layout is straightforward, with a clear title and description, but the white space around the interactive component makes it feel incomplete. The use of bold text for the title is effective, but the lack of color variations and visual elements detracts from overall appeal.
educational_analysis: While the purpose of the demonstration is indicated, the lack of interactive visual elements in the image limits the educational quality. The instructional buttons suggest a measure of engagement, but without more context or visual aids, the educational effectiveness is reduced.
